text.title: Cost-Per-DAU Defense Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Three-question router: preconditions to ratio-vs-target to sunset-threshold. Routes to defend / cut-scope / sunset.

decision-tree.root-question: Are ALL preconditions satisfied? (30 days of ledger AND DAU at least 100 AND owner nameable AND at least one peer reference seed)

branch.question: Is current cost_per_dau_usd at most target_cost_per_dau_usd (per feature OKR)?

branch.conclusion: Emit defense report; classify as 'under-budget'. plan_90_day documents the operating playbook to hold the line.

branch.question: Is cost_per_dau_usd more than 3 times target?

branch.conclusion: Emit defense report flagged 'sunset-candidate'. plan_90_day documents the controlled wind-down or pivot. Escalate to feature owner + finance.
Emit defense report classified 'cut-scope'. plan_90_day enumerates 3 cost-reduction interventions targeting the top 3 drivers.
Skip this run. Surface missing precondition (no ledger? DAU under 100? no peer seed?). Defer until gap is closed.

text.example: inputs: {cost_per_dau=0.041, target=0.025, sunset_multiple=3} q-preconditions -> true q-ratio -> false (0.041 > 0.025) q-sunset -> false (0.041 < 3*0.025) => conclusion r5-90-day-bound: cut-scope report.
